package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for cache_invalidation_before_transaction_commit: Cache mutation or eviction that happens before a write transaction commits.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule012NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule012NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule012NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario012Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule012NegativeService, input Rule012NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
